title: Brenda Flores-Cuellar
compiled_truth: Brenda Flores-Cuellar is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-09 to 2001-11-27), Brenda Flores-Cuellar sent 7 and received 133 emails, totalling 140 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (3), [Patti Thompson](people/patti-thompson) (2), [Thomas Gros](people/thomas-gros) (2), [Brad Romine](people/brad-romine) (2), [Jim Schwieger](people/jim-schwieger) (2).
